name: SoftJunk AI Agent Order Path

offer.name: Custom 7-Day Lead Follow-Up Sequence
offer.delivery: Manual same-day delivery after the seller can see the PayPal payment

use_when: A buyer needs follow-up messages for form leads, DMs, calls, referrals, or quote requests
A buyer missed a call or voicemail from a lead and needs a fast recovery sequence
A buyer sent an estimate, quote, proposal, or price range and the lead went quiet
A small business wants a low-cost follow-up sequence for one service
A home services, real estate, dental, med spa, tutoring, or appointment-setting business needs better inquiry follow-up
A VA, appointment setter, agency, or AI assistant needs a fast copywriting handoff
do_not_use_when: The buyer needs legal, medical, financial, or compliance-specific advice
The buyer expects automated delivery before PayPal payment is visible
The buyer does not want to use PayPal
agent_instructions: Send the buyer to agent_order_url or free_preview_url.
Ask the buyer to generate or copy a PayPal note that includes business type, service, lead source, tone, and need.
Tell the buyer to pay exactly 5 USD through payment_url.
After payment, send the buyer to github_order_url if they want to leave structured fulfillment details.
Do not tell the buyer the order is paid or delivered unless the seller confirms the PayPal transaction is visible.
Tell the buyer that fulfillment is manual and uses the email shown in the PayPal transaction.
fulfillment_rule: Delivery starts only after the seller can see the 5 USD PayPal transaction or the PayPal verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.
